summary: Feature update testing completed. All new features working perfectly. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new UI features (onboarding, quick actions, presets, improved chat UI) working correctly. No critical issues found.

issues: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - React Native web compatibility warning, does not affect functionality
AsyncStorage version mismatch warning (@react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 vs expected 2.2.0) - functionality works correctly despite warning

critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding implementation is clean with proper AsyncStorage persistence
Quick action buttons properly integrated with backend modes (work, business, translate, chat)
Preset prompts correctly trigger chat with predefined messages
LAILA label properly displayed in AI message bubbles for clear user/AI distinction
WOLOF_GUIDE successfully integrated into system prompts for improved Wolof quality
All testID attributes properly implemented for UI testing
Chat UI improvements: AI messages show LAILA avatar + label, user messages show user avatar
Navigation between all 4 tabs working correctly
Translate screen functional with language selection
Assistants screen displays all 6 assistant cards correctly
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_wolof_quality.py (created new test suite for Wolof quality)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features working: onboarding, quick actions, presets, chat UI, navigation)

seed_data_creation: Test conversations created during Wolof quality testing with device_id='TEST_wolof_quality', cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working perfectly. Onboarding shows on first visit and persists completion in AsyncStorage. Quick action buttons and preset chips trigger appropriate chat modes. LAILA label visible in all AI messages. All 4 navigation tabs functional. Translate screen and Assistants screen (6 cards) working correctly. Minor console warnings about pointerEvents and AsyncStorage version are cosmetic and don't affect functionality.

onboarding.details: 4-slide onboarding with Skip/Continue buttons, proper AsyncStorage persistence, 'Start Using LAILA AI' button on last slide

quick_action_buttons.details: All 4 buttons visible and functional: Find Work, Start Business, Translate, Ask Anything

preset_chips.details: All 4 presets visible and functional: Write my CV, Business ideas, Help with homework, Translate to Wolof. Also appear as inline chips during conversation

chat_ui_improvements.details: LAILA label visible above AI messages, user avatar on user messages, clear visual distinction between user and AI

wolof_quality.details: WOLOF_GUIDE integrated into system prompts, Wolof chat and translation working correctly

navigation.details: All 4 tabs working: Chat, Translate, Assistants (6 cards), History
